case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SJUBECT TO DISPOSITION; $4283.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $4,283.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH & SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489.SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. (AS TO CLAIMANT IRA MARK MUSIN ONLY)
